title: A Wet Rescue and a New Beginning
article_text: The weather was tight and wet, and a dark cloud covered the sky. A specialist on the crew had to assist the rescue mission. He wanted to restore the welfare of the local people. The phenomenon of the storm had persuaded the team to act fast. They had to exclude any false hope from their plan. The pupil of a famous teacher was recruited to help. His grand idea was to use a special formula to alter the situation. He had a string of tools that could inspire the team. Hence, the rescue was a success, and the mood improved. If only the weather had been better, the episode would have been easier.

sentences.en: The weather was tight and wet, and a dark cloud covered the sky.
sentences.zh: 天气阴沉潮湿，一片乌云遮住了天空。

sentences.zh: 队伍中的一位专家必须协助救援任务。

sentences.en: The phenomenon of the storm had persuaded the team to act fast.
sentences.zh: 这场风暴的现象说服了团队迅速行动。

image_prompts: A dark sky with tight, wet clouds covering a mountain scene.
A specialist in a rescue crew looking at a map, ready to assist.
A person handing out food to local people to restore their welfare.
A storm with lightning, showing a rare phenomenon, persuading a team to act.
A team planning on a board, excluding false hopes from their plan.
A young pupil being recruited by a teacher to join a rescue team.
A grand idea being drawn on a whiteboard with a formula to alter the situation.
A string of tools laid out on a table, inspiring a team.
A successful rescue scene with happy people, showing improved mood.
A rainy day with a rescue team looking up, wishing the weather was better.
